title: Earthworm Jim 3D
short_description: The wacky earthworm hero traverses his own subconscious to reclaim his lost marbles in this 3D platformer.
description: Earthworm Jim 3D is a 1999 platform game developed by VIS Interactive, the third entry in the Earthworm Jim series. After being knocked into a coma by a flying cow, Jim wakes up inside his own subconscious mind, which has been invaded by his past villains. Players collect Golden Udders to unlock new levels and Green Marbles to progress through each of Jim's four mind chambers. The game was developed for the Nintendo 64 — originally planned for PlayStation before being switched in 1997 — and later ported to PC. In North America, the N64 version was published by Rockstar Games. The game suffered a troubled, prolonged development and received mixed reviews, with critics targeting its camera and describing the final product as failing to live up to the promise of the series' earlier entries.
